title: Assertion failure with complex subquery in selectlist
poc:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."pwprijs" (
         "id"              int           NOT NULL,
         "pid"       int           NOT NULL,
         "lid"   int           NOT NULL,
         "prijs"           real          NOT NULL,
         "Time"            bigint        NOT NULL,
         "recordtimestamp" bigint        NOT NULL,
         CONSTRAINT "pwprijs_id_recordtimestamp_pkey"
 PRIMARY KEY ("id", "recordtimestamp")
 );

SELECT lid,
         AVG(Prijs) as avg_prijs,
         AVG(CASE WHEN RecordTimestamp =
                                 (SELECT
 MAX(i.RecordTimestamp)
                                      FROM pwprijs i
                                      WHERE i.pid = 117097
                                      AND i.lid = o.lid)
                        THEN Prijs END) as current_prijs
 FROM pwprijs o
 WHER pid = 117097
 GROUP BY lid;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure with complex subquery in selectlist
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."product" (
         "product_id"       int           NOT NULL,
         "product_name"     varchar(100) NOT NULL,
         "category_id"      int           NOT NULL,
         "price"           real          NOT NULL,
         "created_at"      timestamp     NOT NULL,
         CONSTRAINT "product_pk"
 PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
 );

SELECT c.category_name, AVG(p.price) as avg_price, (SELECT MAX(p2.price) FROM "sys"."product" p2 WHERE p2.category_id = c.category_id) as max_price FROM "sys"."category" c LEFT JOIN "sys"."product" p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name;
